---
title: "Nadeu_2022_case63_generate_object"
author: "Pakorn Sagulkoo"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
editor: visual
---

## Import the relevant packages and set working path directory

```{r, setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# Attach the packages you will need for the analysis.
library(tidyverse)
library(Seurat)
```

```{r}
# Check working path
getwd()
```

## Define parameters

```{r}
# Define paths
path_to_counts <- here::here("expression_matrices/CLL_52/feature_bc_matrix.csv")
path_to_metadata <- here::here("metadata/CLL_52_cell_metadata.csv")
path_to_patient_metadata <- here::here("metadata/sample_metadata.csv")
path_to_63 <- here::here("reanalysis/results/R_objects/patient_63")
path_to_save <- str_c(path_to_63, "1.seurat_object_unfiltered.rds", sep = "/")
```

## Load data

```{r}
# Load a count matrix
counts <- read_delim(path_to_counts, delim = ";", show_col_types = FALSE)

# Move first column to row names
counts <- as.data.frame(counts)          # ensure it's a data frame
rownames(counts) <- counts[[1]]          # set first column as row names
counts <- counts[ , -1, drop = FALSE]    # remove first column
```

```{r}
# Load a metadata
metadata <- read_delim(path_to_metadata, delim = ";", show_col_types = FALSE)
metadata <- as.data.frame(metadata)
rownames(metadata) <- metadata$cell_barcode
```

## Create a Seurat object

```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
# Create an object
if (all(rownames(metadata) == colnames(counts))) {
  seurat <- CreateSeuratObject(counts = counts, meta.data = metadata)
}
```

## Save the object

```{r}
saveRDS(seurat, path_to_save)
```
